name: Mark Fisher
abstract: Mark Fisher (March 24, 1895 – January 2, 1948) was an American songwriter. Born in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, he died in Long Lake, Illinois.

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: Mark Fisher. ... He was a drummer. He played real well. Played like Max [Roach].
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: I followed a band that was playing in there named Mark Fisher
